faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Corona?
faqs.answer: Corona residents most frequently encounter German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, and American cockroaches (water bugs) in basements and ground-floor units. We also treat Oriental cockroaches and brown-banded roaches commonly found in Queens apartment buildings and commercial spaces.
